name: Chesapeake Gold Corp.
description: Chesapeake Gold Corp. is a Vancouver-based junior mining company focused on the acquisition, evaluation, and development of precious metal deposits in North and Central America. Its flagship asset is the Metates gold-silver-zinc project in Durango State, Mexico, a large-scale bulk-tonnage deposit covering 14,727 hectares across 12 mining concessions. Chesapeake is a developer-stage company working to advance Metates toward feasibility, with the project representing one of the largest undeveloped gold-silver deposits in the Americas.
